definition.ko: 광학요소 구조에 특징이 있는 것 : 렌즈; 라이트 가이드; 기타 요소 G02B3/00; G02B6/00; G02B5/00 재료에 특징이 있는 것 G02B1/00 광학계 일반적 구조 : 광학구성부품의 수와 배치 G02B9/00, G02B11/00 특수한 구조 : 용도에 의한 것; 변배(變倍)의 것; 반사표면을 가진 것 G02B13/00; G02B15/00; G02B17/00 기타 시스템 G02B27/00 3차원 [3D] 효과를 생성하는 광학 시스템 또는 장치 G02B30/00 라이트 가이드와 기타 광학요소를 포함하는 배치의 구조적 세부 G02B6/00 광학 장치 컨덴서 G02B19/00 현미경 G02B21/00 망원경, 잠망경, 중공체(HOLLOW BODY) 내부를 관찰하는 장치, 뷰파인더, 조준 또는 관측장치 G02B23/00 접안렌즈, 확대경 G02B25/00 기타 광학장치 G02B27/00 광 제어 G02B26/00 마운팅, 조절수단, 광-밀 결합 G02B7/00

title.ko: 사용물질에 특징이 있는 광학요소; 광학 요소를 위한 광학 코팅
title.en: Optical elements characterised by the material of which they are made; Optical coatings for optical elements

title.ko: 결정, 예. 암염, 반도체로 만들어진 것(G02B 1/08이 우선)
title.en: made of crystals, e.g. rock-salt, semiconductors (G02B0001080000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 유기물질, 예. 합성수지로서 만들어진 것(G02B 1/08이 우선)
title.en: made of organic materials, e.g. plastics (G02B0001080000 takes precedence)
made of fluids in transparent cells

title.ko: 광학요소에의 적용 또는 표면처리로 인해 산출된 광학코팅(optical coating) ( G02B 1/08 우선 우선 )
title.en: Optical coatings produced by application to, or surface treatment of, optical elements (G02B0001080000 takes precedence)
having sub-optical wavelength surface structures designed to provide an enhanced transmittance, e.g. moth-eye structures
by surface treatment, e.g. by irradiation
having an anti-static effect, e.g. electrically conducting coatings

title.ko: 광학면을 청결하게 유지하기 위한 코팅, 예. 소수성( hydrophobic) 코팅 또는 광촉매코팅 (G02B 1/16 우선)
title.en: Coatings for keeping optical surfaces clean, e.g. hydrophobic or photo-catalytic films (G02B0001160000 takes precedence)
with continuous faces that are rotationally symmetrical but deviate from a true sphere
with discontinuous faces, e.g. Fresnel lens

title.ko: 렌즈 이외의 광학 요소 (라이트 가이드 G02B6/00; 광학 논리 소자 G02F3/00)
title.en: Optical elements other than lenses (light guides G02B0006000000;optical logic elements G02F0003000000)
cube corner, trihedral or triple reflector type
plural reflecting elements forming part of a unitary plate or sheet
transparent spheres being embedded in matrix
plural curved refracting elements forming part of a unitary body

title.ko: 복수의 반사소자가 단일체의 일부를 구성하는 것(G02B 5/124가 우선)
title.en: plural reflecting elements forming part of a unitary body (G02B0005124000 takes precedence)
Polarising elements  (light-modulating devices with active elements G02F0001000000)

title.ko: 라이트 가이드; 라이트 가이드와 다른 광학요소를 포함하는 배치의 구조적 세부, 예. 커플링
title.en: Light guides; Structural details of arrangements comprising light guides and other optical elements, e.g. couplings
with core or cladding having graded refractive index
core or cladding comprising multiple layers

title.ko: 광섬유 다발에 의하여 형성된 것(6/24이 우선)
title.en: formed by bundles of fibres (G02B0006240000 takes precedence)
the relative position of the fibres being the same at both ends, e.g. for transporting images
with fibre bundle in form of plate

title.ko: 광 도파로형의 것 (G02B6/02, G02B6/24가 우선; 전기적, 전자기적, 자기적 또는 음향적 수단에 의한 광의 제어를 위한 장치 또는 배치 G02F1/00; 변조광의 변조 방식의 변환 G02F2/00; 광학적 논리 소자 G02F3/00; 광학적 아날로그/디지털 변환기 G02F7/00)
title.en: of the optical waveguide type  (G02B0006020000, G02B0006240000 take precedence; devices or arrangements for the control of light by electric, magnetic, electro-magnetic or acoustic means G02F0001000000; transferring the modulation of modulated light G02F0002000000; optical logic elements G02F0003000000; optical analogue/digital converters G02F0007000000)
Basic optical elements, e.g. light-guiding paths
Integrated optical circuits characterised by the manufacturing method
Removing protective coverings of light guides before coupling
Preparing the ends of light guides for coupling, e.g. cutting
Splicing of light guides, e.g. by fusion or bonding
Optical coupling means (G02B0006360000, G02B0006420000 take precedence)
with polarisation selective and adjusting means

title.ko: 데이타 버스수단, 즉 상호 결합된 복수의 도파관에 있어서 신호를 혼합, 분기하는 것에 의하여 본질적 으로 쌍방향 전송계를 부여하는 도파관을 갖는 것
title.en: having data bus means, i.e. plural waveguides interconnected and providing an inherently bidirectional system by mixing and splitting signals

title.ko: 가열에 의해 광학요소를 형상화한 라이트 가이드의 구조(G02B 6/255가 우선)
title.en: Structuring of light guides to shape optical elements with heat application (G02B0006255000 takes precedence)
for use between fibre and thin-film device

title.ko: 스위칭 수단을 가지는 것(매질의 광학적 특성의 변환에 의한 것 G02F 1/00)
title.en: having switching means (by changing the optical properties of the medium G02F0001000000)
Mechanical coupling means (G02B0006255000, G02B0006420000 take precedence)
having fibre to fibre mating means
Coupling light guides with opto-electronic elements
Arrangements comprising a plurality of opto-electronic elements and associated optical interconnections

title.ko: 파이버의 인장강도와 외부보호를 부여하기 위한 기계적 구조, 예. 광전송 케이블(도전체와 광파이버를 결합한 케이블 H01B 11/22)
title.en: Mechanical structures for providing tensile strength and external protection for fibres, e.g. optical transmission cables (cables incorporating electric conductors and optical fibres H01B0011220000)

title.ko: 광파이버 또는 광케이블의 설치에 적합한 방법 또는 장치(전기도체 및 광파이버를 포함하는 케이블의 설치 H02G)
title.en: Processes or apparatus adapted for installing optical fibres or optical cables (installation of cables containing electric conductors and optical fibres H02G)
Underground or underwater installation; Installation through tubing, conduits or ducts
using mechanical means, e.g. pulling or pushing devices
Mountings, adjusting means, or light-tight connections, for optical elements
with mechanism for focusing or varying magnification
adapted to co-operate with a remote control mechanism
adapted for automatic focusing or varying magnification
by relative axial movement of several lenses, e.g. of varifocal objective lens
with movable lens means specially adapted for focusing at close distances
Adjusting pupillary distance of binocular pairs

title.ko: 대형 반사경에 특히 적합한 것, 예. 천문학용(G02B 7/185, 7/192, 7/198이 우선)
title.en: specially adapted for very large mirrors, e.g. for astronomy (G02B0007185000, G02B0007192000, G02B0007198000 take precedence)
with means for adjusting the shape of the mirror surface
with means for minimising internal mirror stresses
with means for adjusting the mirror relative to its support
Light-tight connections for movable optical elements
Systems for automatic generation of focusing signals
using parallactic triangle with a base line
using active means, e.g. light emitter
using different areas in a pupil plane
measured at different points on the optical axis
using time delay of the reflected waves, e.g. of ultrasonic waves

title.ko: 복합된 구성요소의 수와 그것들의 부호, 즉 + 또는 -에 의한 배열에 의해 특징 지워진 대물렌즈(G02B 13/00, G02B 15/00가 우선)
title.en: Optical objectives characterised both by the number of the components and their arrangements according to their sign, i.e. + or – (G02B0013000000, G02B0015000000 take precedence)

definition.ko: 이 그룹에 있어서는 구성요소는 단렌즈 또는 복합렌즈와 단렌즈 혹은 복합렌즈와 등가인 분리된 렌즈로 본다

title.en: having one + component only (simple lenses G02B0003000000)
only one component having a compound lens (G02B0009300000 takes precedence)
the rear component having the compound
the middle component having the compound
two of the components having compound lenses (G02B0009300000 takes precedence)
the front and rear components having compound lenses
the middle and rear components having compound lenses
the middle component being a – compound meniscus having a + lens

title.ko: 대물렌즈를 구성하는 단렌즈와 복합렌즈의 총수와 그 배열에 의해 특징지워지는 대물렌즈(G02B 9/00이 우선; 1개의 단렌즈만을 가진 것 G02B 3/00)
title.en: Optical objectives characterised by the total number of simple and compound lenses forming the objective and their arrangement (G02B0009000000 takes precedence;having only one simple lens G02B0003000000)

definition.ko: 그룹 G02B11/02 ~ G02B11/34에서, 접촉이 끊어진 렌즈들은 별도로 계산됩니다. 단순 렌즈는 L, 복합 렌즈는 C로 표시되고, 프론트 렌즈는 먼저 언급됩니다.

title.ko: 이하에 상세히 기재된 목적을 위해 특히 설계된 대물렌즈(변배의 것 15/00)
title.en: Optical objectives specially designed for the purposes specified below (with variable magnification G02B0015000000)
Telephoto objectives, i.e. systems of the type + – in which the distance from the front vertex to the image plane is less than the equivalent focal length

title.ko: 적외선 또는 자외선으로 사용하는 것(G02B 13/14가 우선)
title.en: for use with infrared or ultraviolet radiation (G02B0013160000 takes precedence)
for use in conjunction with image converters or intensifiers
with lenses having one or more non-spherical faces, e.g. for reducing geometrical aberration
for reproducing or copying at short object distances

title.ko: 변배를 위해 수단을 가진 대물렌즈(애너포모틱 대물렌즈 G02B 13/08)
title.en: Optical objectives with means for varying the magnification (anamorphotic objectives G02B0013080000)

title.ko: 대물렌즈의 일부를 교환하는 것, 부가하는 것 또는 삭제하는 것, 예. 변환될 수 있는 대물렌즈
title.en: by changing, adding, or subtracting a part of the objective, e.g. convertible objective

title.ko: 일부를 부가하는 것, 예. 접사용 어태치먼트
title.en: by adding a part, e.g. close-up attachment
by adding telescopic attachments (G02B0015140000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 대물렌즈의 등가초점거리를 연속적으로 변화시키기 위하여 상면에 대하는 하나 이상이 렌즈 또는 렌즈군의 축방향 이동에 의한 것
title.en: by axial movement of one or more lenses or groups of lenses relative to the image plane for continuously varying the equivalent focal length of the objective
compensation by means of only one movement or by means of only linearly related movements, e.g. optical compensation

title.ko: 하나의 렌즈 또는 렌즈군과 다른 렌즈 또는 렌즈군과의 사이에 상호 의존적 비선형 상대이동을 수반하는 것(G02B 15/22가 우선)
title.en: with interdependent non-linearly related movements between one lens or lens group, and another lens or lens group (G02B0015220000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 제1의 가동렌즈 또는 렌즈군 및 제2의 가동렌즈 또는 렌즈군이 둘 다 고정렌즈 또는 렌즈군의 전방에 배치되어 있는 것(G02B 15/177이 우선)
title.en: having a first movable lens or lens group and a second movable lens or lens group, both in front of a fixed lens or lens group (G02B0015177000 takes precedence)
having an additional fixed front lens or group of lenses
having a negative front lens or group of lenses
having an additional movable lens or lens group for varying the objective focal length
with movable lens means specially adapted for focusing at close distances
having a front fixed lens or lens group and two movable lenses or lens groups in front of a fixed lens or lens group
Systems with reflecting surfaces, with or without refracting elements
Catoptric systems, e.g. image erecting and reversing system

title.ko: 어두운 시야 조명을 주는 것(G02B 21/14가 우선)
밝은 시야 조명을 주는 것(G02B 21/14가 우선)

title.en: Arrangements with more than one light-path, e.g. for comparing two specimens
Microscope slides, e.g. mounting specimens on microscope slides

title.ko: 사진촬영용 또는 투영용으로 구성된 것(G02B 21/18이 우선)
title.en: arranged for photographic purposes or projection purposes (G02B0021180000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 망원경, 예. 쌍안경; 잠망경; 중공체의 내부를 관찰하는 장치; 뷰파인더; 광학적 조준 또는 관측 장치
title.en: Telescopes, e.g. binoculars; Periscopes; Instruments for viewing the inside of hollow bodies; Viewfinders; Optical aiming or sighting devices

title.ko: 프리즘 또는 반사경을 포함한 것(G02B 23/14가 우선)
title.en: involving prisms or mirrors (G02B0023140000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 광속분할 또는 합성을 위한 것, 예. 2인 이상의 관찰자를 위한 접안렌즈를 갖춘 것(G02B 23/10이 우선)
title.en: for the purpose of beam splitting or combining, e.g. fitted with eyepieces for more than one observer (G02B0023100000 takes precedence)
having a focusing action, e.g. parabolic mirror
reflecting into the field of view additional indications, e.g. from collimator
with means for image conversion or intensification

title.ko: 하우징; 뚜껑; 마운트; 지지물, 예. 평형추를 가진 것
title.en: Housings; Caps; Mountings; Supports, e.g. with counterweight
Underwater equipments, e.g. for submarine periscope
Instruments for viewing the inside of hollow bodies, e.g. fibrescopes
with means for illuminating object viewed
affording a wide-angle view, e.g. through a spy-hole

title.ko: 가동 또는 변형 가능한 광학 요소를 이용하여 광을 제어하는 광학 장치 또는 광학적 배치(매질에 포함된 요소의 광학적 특성을 수정하여 광을 제어 G02F1/00)
title.en: Optical devices or arrangements for the control of light using movable or deformable optical elements (control of light by modification of the optical properties of the media of the elements involved therein G02F0001000000)
for controlling the intensity of light
by periodically varying the intensity of light, e.g. using choppers

title.ko: 광의 위상을 제어하기 위한 것(G02B 26/08이 우선)
title.en: for controlling the phase of light (G02B0026080000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 광의 방향을 제어하기 위한 것(라이트 가이드 내에서의 것 G02B 6/35)
title.en: for controlling the direction of light (in light guides G02B0006350000)

title.ko: 그룹 G02B1/00 ~ G02B26/00, G02B30/00 어느 하나에도 분류되지 않는 광학계 또는 장치
title.en: Optical systems or apparatus not provided for by any of the groups G02B0001000000-G02B0026000000,G02B0030000000

title.ko: 관찰 또는 읽는 장치(입체 시스템 G02B30/00)
title.en: Viewing or reading apparatus (stereoscopic systems G02B0030000000)
Beam shaping, e.g. changing the cross-sectioned area, not otherwise provided for
Beam splitting or combining systems (mixing and splitting light signals using optical waveguides G02B0006280000;polarising systems G02B0027280000)
for optical projection, e.g. combination of mirror and condenser and objective
for imaging minute objects, e.g. light-pointer
Fiducial marks or measuring scales within the optical system
Grating systems; Zone plate systems (G02B0027460000 takes precedence)
Optics for phase object visualisation (in microscopes G02B0021140000)
Optics using evanescent waves, i.e. inhomogeneous waves
Optics for apodization or superresolution; Optical synthetic aperture systems
Optical apparatus specially adapted for adjusting optical elements during the assembly of optical systems
Imaging systems using optical elements for stabilisation of the lateral and angular position of the image

title.ko: 3차원 [3D] 효과를 생성하기 위한 광학 시스템 또는 장치, 예. 입체 이미지 (현미경용 G02B21/22)
title.en: Optical systems or apparatus for producing three-dimensional [3D] effects, e.g. stereoscopic images (in microscopes G02B0021220000)

title.ko: 관찰자의 왼쪽 눈과 오른쪽 눈에 첫 번째와 두 번째 시차 이미지 제공에 의한 것
title.en: by providing first and second parallax images to an observer’s left and right eyes
using wavelength separation, e.g. using anaglyph techniques
involving temporal multiplexing, e.g. using sequentially activated left and right shutters
characterised by the geometry of the lenticular array, e.g. slanted arrays, irregular arrays or arrays of varying shape or size

title.ko: 패럴랙스 베리어를 포함하는 것 (방향성 광 또는 백라이트 광원을 포함하는 것 G02B30/33)
title.en: involving active parallax barriers   (involving directional light or back-light sources G02B0030330000)
characterised by the geometry of the parallax barriers, e.g. staggered barriers, slanted parallax arrays or parallax arrays of varying shape or size
involving directional light or back-light sources

title.ko: 동일한 객체의 시차 변위 시점에 대응하는 분리된 이미지의 입체 쌍을 제공하는 입체경, 예. 3차원 [3D] 슬라이드 뷰어
title.en: Stereoscopes providing a stereoscopic pair of separated images corresponding to parallactically displaced views of the same object, e.g. three-dimensional [3D] slide viewers
using reflective optical elements in the optical path between the images and the observer
using refractive optical elements, e.g. prisms, in the optical path between the images and the observer

title.ko: 단일 2차원 [2D] 이미지의 관찰자에게 깊이의 지각을 제공하는 것
title.en: giving the observer of a single two-dimensional [2D] image a perception of depth

title.ko: 3차원 [3D] 볼륨에 분산된 이미지 요소로 구성된 이미지, 예. 복셀
title.en: the image being built up from image elements distributed over a three-dimensional [3D] volume, e.g. voxels

title.ko: 2차원 [2D] 평면의 스택 또는 시퀀스로부터 구성되는 3차원 [3D] 볼륨, 예. 깊이 샘플링 시스템
title.en: the three-dimensional [3D] volume being constructed from a stack or sequence of two-dimensional [2D] planes, e.g. depth sampling systems

title.ko: 2차원 [2D] 표면을 이동하여 생성되는 3차원 [3D] 볼륨, 예. 2D 표면을 진동시키거나 회전시키는 것
title.en: the three-dimensional [3D] volume being generated by moving a two-dimensional [2D] surface, e.g. by vibrating or rotating the 2D surface
by projecting aerial or floating images
involving reflecting prisms and mirrors only
